title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
